overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a park at night, transitioning from a grassy garden area with a giant oak tree to a paved walkway, then onto a wet cobblestone street lined with historic buildings illuminated by warm gas street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: park garden with giant oak tree and Spanish moss

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy park area toward paved path

entered.detail: massive oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches covered in Spanish moss
hanging gray moss draping from tree branches
grassy terrain with patches of dirt and small plants
historic buildings with warm lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark park garden dominated by a massive oak tree covered in Spanish moss. The ground is grassy with tropical vegetation, and distant building lights are visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved park walkway with benches and street lamps

events.description: transitioning from grassy area to paved park walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along paved path passing wooden benches and iron fencing

entered.detail: paved concrete path through the park
wooden park bench positioned along the walkway
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
decorative iron fence lining the park perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a paved walkway illuminated by gas street lamps. Wooden benches line the path and an iron fence appears on the left as the park exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with wet cobblestones and gas lamps

events.description: exiting park onto wet cobblestone street lined with historic buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down wet cobblestone street past historic buildings with warm lamplight reflections

entered.detail: wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
multi-story historic brick and stone buildings with lit windows
glistening wet street surface reflecting gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character exits the park onto a wet cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. Gas street lamps cast warm reflections on the glistening pavement as the iron fence continues along the left sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, overgrown park garden into a brightly lit historic city street. It begins amidst tropical vegetation and grass, moving past a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss while distant building lights glimmer through the foliage. As the character advances, the natural terrain shifts into a paved walkway lined with wooden benches and an iron fence under the glow of gas street lamps. The scene then opens further as the camera exits the park, transitioning onto a wet cobblestone street where the warm light of the lamps casts glistening reflections across the pavement and the facades of historic buildings.
